channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Sky to adapt the scariest 'spine-chilling' podcast of 2025 in immersive new documentary series — and it'll completely change your fears about 'World War 3'
item.description: Sky TV is set to adapt 'spine-chilling' podcast The Wargame in a new immersive docuseries, imagining an Russian-waged war on UK soil.

item.title: This screen-free Wi-Fi streamer can save you from Spotify algorithms — turn the Atonemo NTS Radio Player’s dial to choose from 16 ‘Infinite Mixtapes’ and hook it up to your speakers for 24-bit / 192 kHz lossless audio
item.description: This radio player forgoes screens and complications to make music listening straightforward (and it can hook up to your phone).

item.title: La reine des montres Garmin perd 300 euros durant le Prime Day d’Amazon
item.description: La Fenix 8 marque un petit tournant pour cette gamme puisque le nouveau bébé de Garmin se dote d'un écran Amoled. Une nouveauté à découvrir pour 592,10 euros au lieu de 899 euros pendant le Prime Day d'Amazon.

item.title: Après avoir espionné ses employés, Meta a exposé leurs données
item.description: Le programme Model Capability Initiative est conçu pour suivre l'activité des employés de Meta. Les données récoltées, dont certaines confidentielles, étaient accessibles à n'importe quel employé de l'entreprise.

item.title: Mieux qu’une manette Xbox classique ? La Scuf Valor Pro sans fil s’affiche à bien moins de 160 € [Sponso]
item.description: Si vous cherchez la manette ultime pour votre Xbox Series ou votre PC, la Scuf Valor Pro sans fil représente une excellente alternative aux modèles officiels. Ce contrôleur d'élite haut de gamme passe aujourd'hui de 209,99 euros à 157,99 euros chez Amazon.

item.title: Canal+ et Amazon Fire TV élargissent leur alliance à dix marchés européens
item.description: Le groupe audiovisuel Canal+ et le géant américain Amazon viennent d’officialiser un renforcement de leur partenariat stratégique en Europe. L'accord, qui couvre dix pays, vise une intégration plus profonde de l'application Canal+ sur les appareils Fire TV avec une offre promotionnelle inédite en France.

item.title: How AI innovation is outpacing regulation
item.description: Regulation is struggling to keep up with the rapid evolution of AI.

item.title: Best Prime Day Tech Deals Offer Up to $280 Off (2026): Phones, Watches, and More
item.description: Don't pay full price—snag one of these tasty Prime Day tech deals on some of our favorite WIRED-tested gadgets.

item.title: Don't waste your money on the Steam Machine — this build is cheaper and better, as one of the best Prime Day Walmart deals
item.description: Valve's Steam Machine is another RAM crisis victim, but here's a cheaper and better gaming PC deal that you won't find on Amazon.

item.title: Netgear’s Excellent Wi-Fi 7 Mesh Is on Sale for Prime Day
item.description: WIRED’s favorite Wi-Fi 7 mesh system from Netgear is cheaper than ever on Prime Day.

item.title: We're Tracking Prime Day Live To Find Sales Worth Shopping in 2026
item.description: Prime Day is here, and so is our live blog. We'll bring you deals, trends, and commentary throughout Amazon's annual summer sale.

item.title: Our own review gave the Audeze Maxwell 2 four stars, but it's such a brilliant gaming headset that I would have given it five
item.description: I've been testing gaming headsets for nearly a decade, and the Audeze Maxwell 2 is the one I cannot take off.

item.title: I've hand-picked the 99 best Prime Day deals — up to 65% off Apple, Lego, Dyson, Kindle, Samsung, and more
item.description: It's day one of Amazon's 2026 Prime Day sale, and we've ranked the top 99 best deals, from brands like Apple, Ninja, Samsung, Dyson, Kindle, and more.

item.title: Le Prime Day d’Amazon commence enfin ! Voici les meilleures offres en DIRECT
item.description: Amazon lance officiellement son Prime Day dès aujourd'hui et jusqu'à vendredi. Les offres sont nombreuses, mais nous faisons le tri en temps réel pour vous proposer uniquement les plus intéressantes.

item.title: Finding a new PC build without paying a fortune for RAM in this market is a tough task — but MSI's Nvidia-powered laptops are here to save the day
item.description: I wish new PC builders the best of luck finding affordable options this summer, but these MSI gaming laptops should make the hunt easier.

item.title: Sharp lâche TiVo pour Titan OS : l’OS européen qui grignote Google et Samsung sur nos TV
item.description: Sharp Consumer Electronics et Titan OS ont officialisé un partenariat stratégique visant à équiper les téléviseurs connectés de la marque japonaise sur le marché européen.

item.title: Someone made a touch-sensitive mouse mat that could obliterate desk clutter — and Reddit users are ‘shocked it doesn’t already exist’
item.description: The Kage GhostPad is a touch-sensitive mouse mat with built-in programmable buttons.

item.title: New GTA 6 details spotted, including the appearance of a Wolverine actor and an odd easter egg that fans believe is a nod to another GTA game
item.description: New GTA 6 details seemingly confirm the appearance of a Wolverine actor and an easter egg pointing towards a beloved GTA character.

item.title: Beat the memory crisis with my 5 photography workflow tips, and today’s lowest prices on portable SSDs
item.description: Memory prices are sky high so our expert runs through the five best tips to help photographers and videographers reduce memory space

item.title: Noté 9/10, ce smartphone avec son module photo interchangeable et un Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 est à -25% pour le Prime Day
item.description: Le Realme GT 8 Pro est un smartphone Android ambitieux à tous les niveaux que vous retrouvez pour 749,99 euros au lieu de 999,99 euros pendant le Prime Day Amazon.

item.title: Nothing reveals its biggest Phone (4b) teaser yet with a launch date — and it might be the CMF Phone 3 Pro in all but name
item.description: The Nothing Phone (4b) is landing soon as an entry-level alternative to the (4a), but isn't that what the CMF line is for?

item.title: What RAM crisis? You can get an RTX 5070, RTX 5060, or RTX 5050 gaming laptop for as little as £679 at Amazon today
item.description: It's not all doom and gloom for budget gamers; the Amazon Prime Day sale has some rare decent-value gaming laptops.

item.title: The Prime Day Xbox deals are a disappointment, but there are still good bargains to be had — if you buy a PS5
item.description: Don't buy an Xbox Series X this Prime Day, the PS5 is better value all-round.

item.title: Check these 9 'awesome value' productivity boosting gadgets on Prime Day from just $1.87
item.description: Comfort, organization, and productivity shouldn’t break the bank - these 9 smart gadgets start at just $1.87 for Amazon Prime Day.

item.title: China takes back top spot in latest supercomputer ranking
item.description: China took the supercomputer crown by relying on CPUs and not GPUs like other models.

item.title: The best Prime Day deals we found on our favorite gear
item.description: Amazon’s Prime Day is on, and it’s happening for the next four days. Prime members can jump into the deals now until the sale officially ends at 3:01AM ET / 12:01AM PT June 27th. Many discounts will remain the same throughout the duration. We’ve been covering Prime Day in-depth since the shopping event debuted over […]

item.title: Netflix's Gears of War movie finally has a confirmed plot — but a major character might not appear in the adaptation
item.description: Netflix's Gears of War adaptation has an official synopsis, but we're still waiting for further details about the movie.

item.title: Oracle laid off 21,000 employees over the past year, citing AI as one of the reasons
item.description: Oracle's latest filings say it employs 141,000 people, down from 162,000 last year.

item.title: Grâce au Prime Day, l’Apple Watch Ultra 3 s’allège de cent euros
item.description: Si l'Apple Watch Ultra 3 n'est pas parfaite, elle arrivera à faire oublier la plupart de ses défauts grâce à cette remise de 100 euros disponible sur le site d'Amazon durant le Prime Day.

item.title: Apple aurait lancé la production de l’iPhone pliant, le lancement en 2026 semble se confirmer
item.description: Le début de la production de l’iPhone Ultra semble écarter l’hypothèse d’un report en 2027. Si Apple devrait bien présenter son premier iPhone pliant en septembre, sa commercialisation pourrait toutefois intervenir un peu plus tard dans l'année.

item.title: Memory expert predicts huge RAM price hikes over the rest of 2026 — but I'm not buying it (the forecast, or the RAM)
item.description: Fed up with high RAM prices? They could get way worse in 2026, and this is getting seriously depressing now.

item.title: We swept Amazon for the best Prime Day Lego deals — score sets starting at $7.99
item.description: We found 30+ Prime Day Lego deals, with popular Fortnite, NASA, and Botanicals sets on sale at Amazon.

item.title: Mal de dos : cette chaise Sihoo qui suit vos mouvements chute à 404 € pour le Prime Day [Sponso]
item.description: Vous avez mal au dos à force de rester assis ? Sihoo a peut-être la solution avec sa nouvelle chaise ergonomique Doro C300 Pro V2. Pendant le Prime Day, son prix baisse à seulement 429,99 euros et 404,19 euros si vous passez par le site officiel du 3 juin au 1er juillet 2026.

item.title: We found the 17 best Prime Day deals on DJI drones and creator tools — save on wireless mics, drones, and cameras
item.description: Amazon Prime Day DJI drone deals are officially live. Save up to $377 on the DJI Mini 3 drone and the Osmo Action 4 before inventory runs out.

item.title: Amazon Prime Day is here: We found 50+ deals on Apple, Sony, and Lego favorites
item.description: Another Amazon mega sale is now live. Shop the best Prime Day deals on Sony headphones, Samsung TVs, Kindles, and Apple AirPods.

item.title: The Best Digital Wall Calendar (2026): Skylight, Everblog, Apolosign
item.description: I was convinced these devices were just clutter. I was proven wrong.

item.title: The New ‘Odyssey’ Movie Is Sparking a Right-Wing Backlash. This Female Scholar Knows It Well
item.description: Emily Wilson’s 2017 translation of Homer’s epic—the first by a woman—was called a woke “abomination” by online reactionaries. Christopher Nolan’s film is facing similar critiques.

item.title: These are the best smart home deals this Prime Day
item.description: Every Prime Day is a good day to make your home smarter, as deals on connected gear proliferate not just on Amazon but all across the web. And this Prime Day is no different. I sifted through hundreds of offers to find the ones that actually stand out — only the deepest discounts on the […]

item.title: Elon Musk and the plot to hijack America’s broadband
item.description: At 9PM ET on the night of May 28th, a Blue Origin New Glenn rocket sat on the launchpad at the Cape Canaveral Space Force Station. The craft was in the middle of a hot-fire test awaiting the arrival of Amazon Leo satellites, the first of 24 batches to be shuttled into low Earth orbit […]

item.title: Forget the Switch 2 and PS5, the Nex Playground is the surprise game console hit of my household — here's why the best time to buy it is RIGHT NOW
item.description: The Nex Playground console outsold the Xbox last year, and these Prime Day deals could see it happen again.

item.title: As a tech editor on a budget, Im nerding out over these 25 Prime Day tech deals: Save 50% on Bose headphones
item.description: Mashable's tech editor chose the best Prime Day tech deals of 2026. Get AirPods for $99, Kindles for $85, and save 50% on Bose headphones.

item.title: Is a Siren Head movie happening?
item.description: Trevor Henderson's Siren Head monster has been haunting the internet since 2018. But could a movie adaptation now be in the works? We've broken down all the clues.

item.title: 'Act now': Five Eyes warns that AI models specialized for cyber attacks are only months away
item.description: A whole-of-organisation and whole-of-society response is required, Five Eyes is saying, as AI's capabilities grow stronger.

item.title: Amazon veut écouler ses stocks de casques et d’écouteurs avant la fin de la semaine : les meilleures offres du Prime Day sur l’audio
item.description: Accessoires incontournables du quotidien, les casques audio et les écouteurs sans fil permettent de profiter d'un bon son dans la rue, les transports, les parcs ou en terrasse. Avec l'été qui commence à peine, il serait peut-être temps de s'équiper pour écouter dans les meilleures conditions les prochains hits de l'été.

item.title: My Ninja Creami is in overdrive this week — but this alternative ice cream maker on sale for Prime Day might just replace it
item.description: If I didn't already have my beloved Ninja Creami, this is the ice cream maker I'd buy for Prime Day — and it's way better-looking

item.title: 3 ways to move forward when you don’t have a clear plan
item.description: You don’t think your way into clarity. You move your way into it. Not having a clear plan can feel irresponsible.

item.title: The Amazfit Active 2 smartwatch is under $110 / £105, got five stars in our review, and is the perfect buy if you're not a fan of the new Fitbit app
item.description: There's actually no reason not to go for its Premium sapphire-glass screen option.

item.title: Noise-cancelling and open earbuds are down to record-low prices on Prime Day
item.description: We've rounded up the best earbud deals you can grab from June 23 to 26 during Prime Day, including the AirPods Pro 3 for $179.99.

item.title: I can’t bear to go outside in this heat, so I’ll be playing these board games instead while hugging my nearest fan
item.description: Here’s my favorite board games to keep you entertained while staying cool indoors

item.title: Which is the best Amazon Echo Show? A simple guide to Amazon's smart home display range
item.description: Whether you're after the biggest and best Echo Show, the cheapest, or the best value, I've got a recommendation for you.

item.title: This console outsold the Nintendo Switch 2 over Black Friday, but is it actually worth it?
item.description: How to choose the better top-selling family console for you.
